frame_description: peak radial at 60% of frame diameter, full brightness, visible debris particles at the edge
color_palette: white-hot core with yellow and orange falloff, avoid pure magenta chroma in the effect
style_modifiers: cel-shaded with 3-level gradient, crisp defined edges, suitable for overlay on gameplay
expected: radial burst with clean core, readable silhouette, no background, no depth — just the effect sprite. Chromakey should extract cleanly since the effect colors (white/yellow/orange) are far from magenta.

color_palette: orange-red fire with yellow core and dark smoke top, avoid pure magenta chroma
style_modifiers: pixel-art with visible pixel edges, no antialiasing, 32-color limited palette
expected: pixel-art flame frame readable as one frame of a loop; base wide and tips tall-and-split; no background; chromakey tight on magenta

color_palette: emerald green with soft gold highlights, avoid pure magenta chroma
